<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d"></a>

# Generic6DOFJoint3D

**Inherits:** [Joint3D](class_joint3d.md#class-joint3d) **<** [Node3D](class_node3d.md#class-node3d) **<** [Node](class_node.md#class-node) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A physics joint that allows for complex movement and rotation between two 3D physics bodies.

## Description

The **Generic6DOFJoint3D** (6 Degrees Of Freedom) joint allows for implementing custom types of joints by locking the rotation and translation of certain axes.

The first 3 DOF represent the linear motion of the physics bodies and the last 3 DOF represent the angular motion of the physics bodies. Each axis can be either locked, or limited.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-linear-lower-limit"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_LINEAR_LOWER_LIMIT** = `0`

The minimum difference between the pivot points' axes.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-linear-upper-limit"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_LINEAR_UPPER_LIMIT** = `1`

The maximum difference between the pivot points' axes.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-linear-limit-softness"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_LINEAR_LIMIT_SOFTNESS** = `2`

A factor applied to the movement across the axes. The lower, the slower the movement.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-linear-restitution"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_LINEAR_RESTITUTION** = `3`

The amount of restitution on the axes' movement. The lower, the more momentum gets lost.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-linear-damping"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_LINEAR_DAMPING** = `4`

The amount of damping that happens at the linear motion across the axes.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-linear-motor-target-velocity"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_LINEAR_MOTOR_TARGET_VELOCITY** = `5`

The velocity the linear motor will try to reach.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-linear-motor-force-limit"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_LINEAR_MOTOR_FORCE_LIMIT** = `6`

The maximum force the linear motor will apply while trying to reach the velocity target.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-angular-lower-limit"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_ANGULAR_LOWER_LIMIT** = `10`

The minimum rotation in negative direction to break loose and rotate around the axes.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-angular-upper-limit"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_ANGULAR_UPPER_LIMIT** = `11`

The minimum rotation in positive direction to break loose and rotate around the axes.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-angular-limit-softness"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_ANGULAR_LIMIT_SOFTNESS** = `12`

The speed of all rotations across the axes.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-angular-damping"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_ANGULAR_DAMPING** = `13`

The amount of rotational damping across the axes. The lower, the more damping occurs.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-angular-restitution"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_ANGULAR_RESTITUTION** = `14`

The amount of rotational restitution across the axes. The lower, the more restitution occurs.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-angular-force-limit"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_ANGULAR_FORCE_LIMIT** = `15`

The maximum amount of force that can occur, when rotating around the axes.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-angular-erp"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_ANGULAR_ERP** = `16`

When rotating across the axes, this error tolerance factor defines how much the correction gets slowed down. The lower, the slower.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-param-angular-motor-target-velocity"></a>

[Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param) **PARAM_ANGULAR_MOTOR_TARGET_VELOCITY** = `17`

If enabled, rotational motion is possible within the given limits.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-flag-enable-linear-spring"></a>

[Flag](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-flag) **FLAG_ENABLE_LINEAR_SPRING** = `3`

There is currently no description for this enum. Please help us by [contributing one](https://contributing.godotengine.org/en/latest/documentation/class_reference.html)!

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-flag-enable-angular-spring"></a>

[Flag](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-flag) **FLAG_ENABLE_ANGULAR_SPRING** = `2`

There is currently no description for this enum. Please help us by [contributing one](https://contributing.godotengine.org/en/latest/documentation/class_reference.html)!

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-flag-enable-motor"></a>

[Flag](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-flag) **FLAG_ENABLE_MOTOR** = `4`

If enabled, there is a rotational motor across these axes.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-flag-enable-linear-motor"></a>

[Flag](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-flag) **FLAG_ENABLE_LINEAR_MOTOR** = `5`

If enabled, there is a linear motor across these axes.

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-constant-flag-max"></a>

[Flag](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-flag) **FLAG_MAX** = `6`

Represents the size of the [Flag](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-flag) enum.

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-property-angular-limit-x-damping"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **angular_limit_x/damping** = `1.0` [🔗](#class-generic6dofjoint3d-property-angular-limit-x-damping)

-  **set_param_x**(param: [Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param), value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_param_x**(param: [Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param)) 

The amount of rotational damping across the X axis.

The lower, the longer an impulse from one side takes to travel to the other side.

---

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-property-angular-limit-x-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **angular_limit_x/enabled** = `true` [🔗](#class-generic6dofjoint3d-property-angular-limit-x-enabled)

- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **get_flag_x**(flag: [Flag](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-flag)) 

If `true`, rotation across the X axis is limited.

---

<a id="class-generic6dofjoint3d-property-angular-limit-x-erp"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **angular_limit_x/erp** = `0.5` [🔗](#class-generic6dofjoint3d-property-angular-limit-x-erp)

-  **set_param_x**(param: [Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param), value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))
- [float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_param_x**(param: [Param](#enum-generic6dofjoint3d-param)) 

When rotating across the X axis, this error tolerance factor defines how much the correction gets slowed down. The lower, the slower.

---
